sources.name: Standard Occupational Classification (SOC)
sources.role: Occupation taxonomy backbone — hierarchy from major groups to detailed occupations

sources.name: Occupational Employment and Wage Statistics (OEWS)
sources.role: Employment counts and wage measures by occupation, geography, and industry

sources.name: O*NET (Occupational Information Network)
sources.role: Semantic descriptors — skills, knowledge, abilities, and tasks for each occupation

sources.name: Employment Projections
sources.role: 10-year employment outlook with growth rates and education requirements
